metadata.description: Personal user-scope Claude Code skills: internal-ca (2-tier PKI bootstrap), mtls (server-trusts-client mTLS), lxd-claude-setup (headless Claude Code setup on LXD/Linux), a bare-metal Kubernetes family — k8s-bare-metal (kubeadm + Rancher, single-node/HA/join), harbor-registry (private Harbor with self-signed CA), cicd-platform (Argo CD + self-hosted Actions runners) — and the MJBL mTLS platform suite (live deployed ecosystem on this host: platform/ca/enrollment/client/cert-lifecycle/operator-portal/troubleshooting, indexing the /home/mjbl/* runbooks). Plus the MJBL Kubernetes estate suite under /mjbl:k8s:* (platform, prod, facility, dr): the multi-cluster topology (prod rkek8s, facility/ArgoCD, UAT, DR), kubeconfigs, MetalLB, ArgoCD external-cluster deploys, and the kubectl-apply DR tooling.

plugins.name: claude-skills
plugins.description: Bundled PKI + ops + bare-metal Kubernetes skills (/k8s-setup, /harbor-setup, /cicd-setup) PLUS the MJBL mTLS platform suite under /mjbl:mtls:* (platform, ca, enroll, client, cert, portal, troubleshoot, issue-server) — operational skills for the live MJBL mTLS ecosystem that index the /home/mjbl/* runbooks as source-of-truth. Battle-tested runbooks with frontmatter triggers so Claude Code can auto-activate them. PLUS the MJBL Kubernetes estate suite under /mjbl:k8s:* (platform, prod, facility, dr) — the prod rkek8s / facility-ArgoCD / UAT / DR multi-cluster topology, kubeconfigs, MetalLB, ArgoCD external-cluster deploys, and kubectl-apply DR tooling.
